choreography.description: Both squares fade in at their starting positions, 240px apart horizontally.

1-3s: Both squares move toward the center while rotating 180°. 3-5s: Squares orbit around each other in a circular path (radius ~80px), completing one full rotation. 5-6s: During orbit, they swap positions horizontally (red moves to the right, blue to the left).
6-7s: Rotation stops and squares stabilize in new positions. 7-8s: Both scale up to 130px and return to original size.
